constraints: Transparent T-addresses only (t1/t3 on mainnet, tm on testnet/mocknet). Do NOT implement shielded z-addresses or Orchard in this iteration. Clone Bitcoin UTXO HTLC patterns from htlc-btc: P2WSH/P2SH-style scripts adapted for Zcash transparent UTXOs. Address validation must reject z-addresses. Lock order follows DEV-2787 chronological base/match encoding. Trade routes: ZEC↔USDC, ZEC↔USDT, USDC↔USDT with stable→ZEC reversed routes always enabled (post DEV-2986, no reversed-direction flag). Mocknet: zcashd regtest or compatible transparent-only fixture. Document Zcash-specific params: branch id, consensus params, min relay fee, tx expiry if applicable.
